raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Foundation Laws are referenced but not fully implemented in code; Law 3 (Shame-Free Language) violated by potential guilt-inducing patterns in onboarding flows.", "recommended_fix": "Enforce banned phrases via i18n linter in CI/CD. Audit all user-facing strings against Law 3 table."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/onboarding", "issue": "Onboarding may trigger decision paralysis — multiple CTAs observed, violating Law 5 (One Primary Action).", "recommended_fix": "Reduce tappable elements to ≤5, ensure one primary CTA per screen."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "design/ANIMATION-SYSTEM", "issue": "Animation specs lack `prefers-reduced-motion` branches, violating Law 4.", "recommended_fix": "Add reduced-motion variants for all animations; enforce in design system audit."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/onboarding/index.tsx", "apps/web/src/styles/animation.ts"]}

findings.issue: Foundation Laws are referenced but not fully implemented in code; Law 3 (Shame-Free Language) violated by potential guilt-inducing patterns in onboarding flows.
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce banned phrases via i18n linter in CI/CD. Audit all user-facing strings against Law 3 table.

findings.issue: Onboarding may trigger decision paralysis — multiple CTAs observed, violating Law 5 (One Primary Action).
findings.recommended_fix: Reduce tappable elements to ≤5, ensure one primary CTA per screen.

findings.issue: Animation specs lack `prefers-reduced-motion` branches, violating Law 4.
findings.recommended_fix: Add reduced-motion variants for all animations; enforce in design system audit.
